dropped.reason: too short to carry a claim

meta.model: Gemini gemini-flash-lite-latest · US (and trains on free-tier prompts)

clusters.label: Payment failures and phantom bank charges without ticket generation
Authentication failures, credential rejection, and password reset loops
Redesign complexity, information overload, and slow performance
Frequent app crashes, unhandled exceptions, and server error messages
Purchased tickets disappearing and failing to sync with mobile wallets
Arbitrary purchase cutoffs blocking bookings before departure
Forced system language matching, translation errors, and accessibility blocks

insights.title: Payment gateways report errors to the app while successfully debiting user accounts, leaving passengers without tickets.
insights.summary: Users frequently attempt to purchase tickets through integrated payment providers, only to encounter an error message claiming the transaction failed. However, their banking institutions confirm that funds were successfully debited from their accounts. Because the app fails to generate the booking or display the ticket after charging the user, travellers are forced to buy tickets a second time or face fines onboard. This discrepancy severely damages trust in the e-commerce infrastructure. Restoring transaction reliability requires aligning frontend payment state handlers with backend gateway confirmations.

evidence.name: MX
evidence.quote: Ho acquistato un biglietto, i soldi sono stati sottratti dal mio conto ma senza biglietto. Ancora devo ricevere il rimborso

evidence.name: NZ
evidence.quote: Più volte mi è successo che l'app si blocchi e non mi dà il biglietto acquistato anche se dalla carta i soldi sono stati presi . mi è successo anche comprando biglietti costosi…

evidence.name: LE
evidence.quote: L’app di Trenitalia era una delle poche cose che funzionava decentemente. L’hanno aggiornata e adesso è completamente inutilizzabile. Schermate tutt’altro che intuitive, fasi di…

insights.recommendation: Implement robust webhook handling and transaction reconciliation to ensure that if a payment succeeds at the bank, the order is automatically fulfilled in the app without requiring a manual repurchase.

insights.title: User authentication credentials stored or modified on the website are persistently rejected by the mobile application.
insights.summary: Customers attempting to log into the app find their credentials repeatedly rejected, even immediately after successfully resetting their passwords or logging into the web platform without issues. Users report being trapped in endless password reset loops or encountering generic error prompts during login. This breakdown indicates a severe desynchronization between the mobile application backend and the primary user database. Resolving this requires unifying identity verification pathways across web and mobile channels.

evidence.name: JW
evidence.quote: I set up my account on the website, and using the credentials on the app does not work. Tried resetting multiple times. Useless.

evidence.name: GL
evidence.quote: Used to love this app. Now I can’t log in. I do not use a VPN, have used both cellular and Wi-Fi, and reset my password MANY times. I can log into the website without issue, but…

evidence.name: JP
evidence.quote: the app automatically signed me out and each time I sign in it says the login credentials are wrong.( even after i clearly insert them). also when I changed my password and tried…

insights.recommendation: Audit the mobile authentication API endpoints and token validation logic to ensure immediate synchronization with the central user database.

insights.title: Recent UI redesigns introduced severe latency, complex navigation paths, and information overload for everyday commuters.
insights.summary: Following recent visual updates, users experience extreme sluggishness when loading pages, searching for trains, or attempting to view saved tickets. Essential functions that were previously straightforward now require navigating multiple redundant screens and dealing with unnecessary promotional overlays. Commuters who rely on fast interactions are heavily penalized by these design regressions, frequently missing trains while trying to complete basic actions. Reverting unnecessary UI complexity will restore critical task efficiency.

evidence.name: MI

evidence.name: PA
evidence.quote: Dopo il nuovo aggiornamento la UX è imbarazzante. Al netto di piccoli bug, tutto il mondo interfaccia é stato nettamente complicato con un overload informativo completamente…

evidence.name: DT

insights.recommendation: Streamline the checkout and ticket display flows to minimize navigation steps and remove non-essential UI elements that slow down page loading times.
